name: @lionchat/mcp-server
description: MCP server for LionChat API — 547 tools + 10 resources + 9 prompts for AI agents (FlowBuilder enriched)

scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy-docs && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.copy-docs: mkdir -p dist/docs/resources dist/docs/prompts && cp src/docs/instructions.md dist/docs/ && cp src/docs/resources/*.md dist/docs/resources/ && cp src/docs/prompts/*.json dist/docs/prompts/
